place: Bophut Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Sea-View Hilltop Estate with Tennis Court & Boxing Ring
blurb: The crown jewel of an exclusive private hilltop retreat — a six-bedroom hilltop villa with unobstructed panoramic sea views, a 25-metre infinity pool, and a rare depth of recreation: private cinema, games room, gym, sauna, a full tennis court and even a Muay Thai boxing ring.
detail:
One of Koh Samui's finest private retreats, this is a stunning six-bedroom villa set into the Bophut hills with panoramic, unobstructed sea views — the jewel in the crown of an exclusive private retreat. You enter via stepping stones over a koi pond, passing tall Buddha statues set into a stone-clad wall, into a stylish two-storey central building whose upper level holds a vast, glass-walled lounge and dining room beneath a cascading glass chandelier, framing a backdrop of seascape and tropical forest.

Each of the three master bedrooms occupies its own standalone pavilion, all with dramatic sea and island views from king-size beds, glass-walled rain showers, a private rooftop garden with a terrazzo bathtub and terrace — and one with its own 12-metre pool. Rooms slide open onto a wide terrace above the garden and the enticing 25-metre infinity pool that overflows toward the horizon, with a poolside sala and sunset sala alongside.

What sets it apart is the sheer range of recreation: a gym kitted with rowing, cycling, running machines and weights; a games room with pool table; a private cinema with ten La-Z-Boy chairs; a children's playroom and kids' club; a wine cellar and night-club room; a sauna and steam room; a dedicated spa; a private tennis court; and a Muay Thai boxing ring. Across roughly 3,200 m² and three floors, it sleeps up to fourteen, fully staffed with villa manager, housekeeping and meals from the retreat's central kitchen — a singular setting for celebrations and events for up to sixty guests.

features.l: 25 m infinity pool + private 12 m pool
Private tennis court & Muay Thai ring
